name: Maxim Integrated Products, Inc.
description: Maxim Integrated Products, Inc. was an American semiconductor company that specialized in the design, manufacture, and sale of analog and mixed-signal integrated circuits. The company served a diverse range of markets, including automotive, industrial, communications, consumer electronics, and computing. Known for solving complex engineering challenges, Maxim provided innovative solutions that empowered design efficiency and performance. In 2021, the company was acquired by Analog Devices, Inc., integrating its extensive portfolio of high-performance analog products into the broader operations of the combined entity to further advance semiconductor technology and design innovation.
